pointer_discovery_profile.selection_rule: report each path ending in properties/<property-name> when the property name is in exact_property_markers; also report principal_type when its local schema has const human or an enum containing human
pointer_discovery_profile.semantic_limit: pointer discovery is a deterministic over-inclusive signal; primary classification and decision-family applicability remain explicit census judgments

class_definitions.direct_or_policy_conditional_assurance_s: record can assert or consume a consequential human-only decision for at least one policy branch
class_definitions.pending_operator_acceptance_consumer: architecture candidate currently has a null acceptance slot that must remain blocked until a typed assurance-backed acceptance is reissued
class_definitions.transitive_or_transport_surface: command, event, subject, registry, projection, or downstream reference surface that must be mapped but is not automatically an H decision
class_definitions.non_authority_human_or_integrity_metadat: human label, review observation, signature, seal, ownership, or integrity metadata that cannot satisfy an H slot
class_definitions.no_human_decision_assurance_surface: no assurance applicability was found in the frozen profile
class_definitions.candidate_mechanism_not_baseline_consume: new unissued PRQ-013 mechanism candidate; it grants no authority and does not migrate a consumer

command_type_partition.classification_basis: conservative first-slice applicability partition; a policy-conditional producer still requires a runtime applicability rule before any H slot can be evaluated

event_type_partition.classification_basis: persisted-fact counterpart of the conservative command applicability partition

h_slots.applicability: approval activation recovery or seal branch

transitive_consumer_families.known_gap: strategy.promotion_decided uses generic decision_payload and does not bind an exact typed PromotionDecision reference

validator_census.notes: retains census completeness only for the exact frozen source corpus, binds those census bytes, and retains current_consumers_migrated false; does not dereference an assurance record at a consuming transition
founding-fixture signature and nominal key/recovery quorum checks cover bounded integrity relations only; they do not establish challenge gesture custody replay or effective control
valid human-labelled records prove schema shape only; candidate HDA fixtures do not migrate any retained consumer
synthetic review fixtures do not prove signature truth or PRQ-013
does not prove human-controlled ceremony or effective-control separation
no HumanDecisionAssurance or H-slot enforcement was found
future non-null acceptance requires reissue rather than mutation
future non-null acceptance requires reissue rather than mutation
future non-null acceptance requires reissue rather than mutation
future non-null acceptance requires reissue rather than mutation
does not accept an assurance-backed operator decision

missing_contract_nodes.rule: aggregate missing counts are not census closure; each future retained member identity must be added to the applicable command event aggregate reducer and decision-family partition before its count can close

steps: enumerate every schemas/*.schema.json path from the exact baseline git tree and require exactly 112 paths
require each baseline path exactly once and recompute its observed $id raw SHA-256 byte length and matching pointers from baseline bytes
enumerate the three side-by-side candidate mechanism schemas separately and require they do not enter the baseline partition
recompute matching pointers using pointer_discovery_profile; any new removed or changed matching pointer fails until the row is reviewed and rebound
read all 121 command types from schemas/command-envelope.schema.json:/$defs/command_type/enum and require exactly one command partition membership
read all 135 event types from schemas/research-event.schema.json:/properties/event_type/enum and require exactly one event partition membership

map every H slot in docs/AUTHORITY_MATRIX.md lines 83 84 86 88 90 91 92 93 95 97 100 101 102 103 and 104 to a decision family producer command or explicit missing node persisted event or explicit missing node and downstream consumer family
require every operator_acceptance_ref in the frozen corpus to appear in operator_acceptance_consumers and remain null until reissued with a typed assurance-backed contract
require every direct or conditional consumer with no current assurance reference to remain blocked and consumer_migrated false

require every H slot to accept only an admitted current nonexpired nonreplayed AssuredDecision wrapper evaluated at the consuming frontier with supported authority and distinct-effective-principal quorum; Core Evidence and individual Seal records are never H-slot inputs

freeze only the unissued individual-assurance foundation in T0; construct T1 AuthorityAssignment and the required T2 command event state reducer currentness quorum and consumer dependencies before wrapper construction or migration

treat Gate A as architecture evidence and exact-byte acceptance only; a real protected ceremony requires separate bounded Gate B authority and runtime conformance remains a Gate C implementation exit condition
require every suppression to identify exact path pointer classification reason and accountable review reference; this artifact declares no suppressions
require new schema command event module aggregate decision role H slot or operator-acceptance surface to fail closed until added to this census

consumer migration may become true only after new consumer identities or exact typed wrappers command and event reissue dereference and equality rules replay controls effective-control quorum checks and end-to-end known-bads pass
